vehicles.bed_rail_system: Rivian Gear Tunnel + Camp Kitchen rail
vehicles.notes: Attaches to Rivian R1T bed rail system. Uses built-in 120V power outlet (1500W). Also compatible with aftermarket rail systems.

fitment_notes: Designed specifically for Rivian R1T bed rail ecosystem. Leverages native 120V outlet in gear tunnel. Compatible with 2022–2025 model years.
target_queries: weatherproof power box for Rivian R1T
